languages.text: {n}Пряча руку за спиной, вы делаете незаметное движение пальцами. Гремит выстрел, и женщина перед вами мешком валится на пол.{/n}
{n}Tucking your hand behind your back, you make an imperceptible movement with your fingers. A shot rings out, and the woman in front of you drops to the deck.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Пряча руку за спиной, вы делаете незаметное движение пальцами. Гремит выстрел, и женщина перед вами мешком валится на пол.{/n}

{n}Tucking your hand behind your back, you make an imperceptible movement with your fingers. A shot rings out, and the woman in front of you drops to the deck.{/n}

languages.text: {n}背中に手を隠し、指先で微かな動きをする。銃声と共に、目の前の女性が甲板に倒れ込んだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Tucking your hand behind your back, you make an imperceptible movement with your fingers. A shot rings out, and the woman in front of you drops to the deck.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 背中に手を隠し、指先で微かな動きをする。銃声と共に、目の前の女性が甲板に倒れ込んだ。

languages.text: {n}Elini arkana saklayarak parmaklarınla fark edilmez bir hareket yapıyorsun. Bir el silah sesi duyuluyor ve önündeki kadın güverteye yığılıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Tucking your hand behind your back, you make an imperceptible movement with your fingers. A shot rings out, and the woman in front of you drops to the deck.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Elini arkana saklayarak parmaklarınla fark edilmez bir hareket yapıyorsun. Bir el silah sesi duyuluyor ve önündeki kadın güverteye yığılıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Colocas la mano a tu espalda y haces un movimiento imperceptible con los dedos. Un disparo resuena y la mujer frente a ti cae sobre la cubierta.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Tucking your hand behind your back, you make an imperceptible movement with your fingers. A shot rings out, and the woman in front of you drops to the deck.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Colocas la mano a tu espalda y haces un movimiento imperceptible con los dedos. Un disparo resuena y la mujer frente a ti cae sobre la cubierta.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你将手背在身后，手指做了一个极其隐蔽的动作。一声枪响划破空气，你面前的女人应声倒地。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Tucking your hand behind your back, you make an imperceptible movement with your fingers. A shot rings out, and the woman in front of you drops to the deck.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你将手背在身后，手指做了一个极其隐蔽的动作。一声枪响划破空气，你面前的女人应声倒地。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous glissez une main dans votre dos et remuez vos doigts de manière presque imperceptible. Un coup de feu retentit, puis la femme devant vous s'effondre sur le pont.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Tucking your hand behind your back, you make an imperceptible movement with your fingers. A shot rings out, and the woman in front of you drops to the deck.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous glissez une main dans votre dos et remuez vos doigts de manière presque imperceptible. Un coup de feu retentit, puis la femme devant vous s'effondre sur le pont.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du versteckst deine Hand hinter deinem Rücken und machst eine unmerkliche Bewegung mit den Fingern. Ein Schuss kracht, und die Frau vor dir fällt zu Boden.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Tucking your hand behind your back, you make an imperceptible movement with your fingers. A shot rings out, and the woman in front of you drops to the deck.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du versteckst deine Hand hinter deinem Rücken und machst eine unmerkliche Bewegung mit den Fingern. Ein Schuss kracht, und die Frau vor dir fällt zu Boden.{/n}
